description_long: This object is a stylized yellow flower with a central bloom featuring multiple layered petals arranged in a radial pattern. The main flower is accompanied by two unopened buds, each with a greenish hue and a slightly faceted, geometric appearance. The flower and buds are attached to slender, green stems that converge at a small, spherical base resembling a bulb or tuber. From this base, several thin, brown, root-like structures extend outward, giving the impression of a plant recently pulled from the ground. The petals of the main bloom are arranged in two distinct layers, with the inner layer being lighter in color and more compact. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, with a matte finish and a low-poly aesthetic.
description: A stylized yellow flower with layered petals, two green buds, and thin brown roots extending from a spherical base. The design is geometric and visually striking, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: The main yellow flower is centered, flanked by two green buds and visible brown roots spreading outward from the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the petals and the spherical base, with one bud and the main flower in profile.
description_view_2: Frontal view of the flower showing the full radial arrangement of petals and both buds clearly, with roots extending below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the profile of a bud and the main flower, with roots trailing downward.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with two distinct layers; the outer layer consists of larger, pointed petals, while the inner layer is more compact and lighter in color, creating a symmetrical, layered effect.
